string.text: Auto Ammo Pickup {VERSION}
Enable Mod
Master toggle. When off, no automatic ammo pickup will occur.
Pickup Mode
Controls what kind of ammo the mod will automatically pick up.
Mode: Default - any usable ammo from equipped weapons
Picks up any usable ammo type inferred from your equipped weapons and free slots.
Mode: Only currently equipped ranged weapon ammo
Restricts pickup to ammo compatible with the currently wielded ranged weapon.
Mode: Disabled
Disables automatic ammo pickup.
Default - Any usable ammo based on your equipped weapons
Only ammo for the currently equipped ranged weapon (in-hand)
Disable while crouching

When checked (default), automatic pickup is suspended while your character is in the crouched stance (default toggle key: Z). Useful to avoid picking up ammo while trying to stay hidden or aim carefully.
Show Pickup Messages
Display a small yellow message when ammo is automatically picked up.
Auto Pickup Distance (meters)
How close (horizontal) the player must be to auto-pick up ammo. Lower values feel more realistic.
Auto Ammo Pickup loaded. Ammo will be automatically collected in battles when in range.
Picking up {AMOUNT} {ITEM}
